ogTitle: Yarra Glen vs Yarra Junction: Climate Safety

heading: Yarra Glen vs Yarra Junction — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yarra Glen, Victoria and Yarra Junction, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yarra Glen and Yarra Junction have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Yarra Glen or Yarra Junction safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yarra Glen has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Yarra Junction scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yarra Glen scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Yarra Junction scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yarra Glen or Yarra Junction?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yarra Glen has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
